name: Heritage Roofing Co.
seoDescription: Heritage Roofing Company is a Santa Rosa, family-owned roofing contractor serving the North Bay since 1993 — GAF Master Elite certified, BBB A+ rated, specializing in roof replacement, repair, metal roofing, and seamless gutters across Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino counties.

contact.address: 4701 Old Redwood Hwy, Suite 2D, Santa Rosa, CA 95403

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa · Roofing the North Bay since 1993
sections.heading: The North Bay's only GAF President's Club roofing contractor
sections.subheading: Heritage Roofing Company is a family-owned Santa Rosa contractor that has installed, replaced, and repaired roofs across Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino counties for more than 30 years — to a standard fewer than 2% of roofers in the country are certified to meet.

sections.heading: Credentials you can actually verify
sections.intro: A roof is only as good as the crew and the warranty behind it. Heritage holds the certifications that let us back ours the way few North Bay roofers can.

items.title: GAF Master Elite®
items.body: Fewer than 2% of roofing contractors earn Master Elite status — and as a GAF 2-Star President's Club contractor, Heritage is the only one in the North Bay to hold that distinction.

items.title: Three decades, one name
items.body: Family-owned and operating in Santa Rosa since 1993. The same company stands behind the roof years after the last shingle goes on.

items.title: Clean, fast, finished
items.body: Customers consistently note jobs completed efficiently — sometimes a full re-roof in a single day — with the property left clean from beginning to end.

sections.heading: Roofing for North Bay homes and buildings
sections.intro: From a full tear-off and replacement to a single leak, Heritage handles the whole roof — and everything that keeps it watertight.

items.title: Roof Replacement & Installation
items.description: Complete tear-off and re-roof with GAF composition shingle systems, installed to Master Elite specification so the manufacturer's strongest warranties apply.

items.title: Composition Shingle Roofs
items.description: The North Bay's most popular roof — durable, fire-rated, and available in a wide range of colors and architectural profiles to suit your home.

items.title: Metal & Single-Ply Roofing
items.description: Standing-seam metal and single-ply membrane systems for homes and low-slope commercial roofs built to last decades.

items.title: Seamless Gutters
items.description: Custom seamless gutters formed on-site and integrated with the roof so water leaves the building the way it should.

items.title: Repairs & Dry Rot
items.description: Leak diagnosis, flashing and shingle repair, and dry-rot replacement on fascia and sheathing — fixing the cause, not just the symptom.

items.title: Skylights, Sun Tubes & Solar Prep
items.description: Skylight and sun-tube installation, attic ventilation, and roof preparation for solar so your panel install goes on a sound, warrantied roof.

sections.heading: Three decades on North Bay roofs
The roof — and the coverage few roofers can offer
sections.body: Master Elite certification isn't a logo. It's what lets Heritage register your roof for GAF's strongest manufacturer-backed coverage, on top of standing behind our own workmanship.
points: GAF Golden Pledge® Limited Warranty available to Master Elite customers
GAF 2-Star President's Club — the only North Bay contractor to hold it

items.quote: My wife and I can't say enough about the new roof David and his crew installed on our house. We canvassed friends, co-workers and family for referrals and were surprised at how many times Heritage Roofing popped up. The entire job was performed quickly, cleanly and with complete professionalism.
items.author: Homeowner

items.quote: From the first meeting through installation and cleanup, the individuals at Heritage Roofing were both professional and personable. Our roof was installed in one day.
items.author: Verified review

items.quote: Great service, reasonable prices, and a quality roof — the owner is a professional and the crew is hard-working. We were happy with Heritage, as were our neighbors who also used them.
items.author: Neighbor review

sections.heading: Need a roof, or just an honest opinion on one?
sections.body: Heritage Roofing Company serves Santa Rosa and the greater North Bay. Call (707) 544-4500 or reach out for an inspection and estimate.

sections.heading: Complete roofing for North Bay homes
sections.subheading: New roofs, replacements, repairs, gutters, and the details that keep water out — installed to GAF Master Elite standard.

items.title: Roof Replacement & Installation
items.description: When a roof is past repair, Heritage handles the full tear-off, deck inspection, and re-roof. As a GAF Master Elite contractor we install complete shingle systems — underlayment, ventilation, and accessories — so the manufacturer's longest warranties apply, not just the shingle.

items.title: Composition Shingle Roofs
items.description: Architectural composition shingles are the North Bay's workhorse roof: fire-rated, long-lasting, and available in profiles and colors that fit everything from a ranch home to Fountaingrove and Oakmont properties.

items.title: Metal & Single-Ply Roofing
items.description: Standing-seam metal for homes that want a 50-year roof, and single-ply membrane for low-slope and commercial roofs — both installed by crews who do this every week.

items.title: Seamless Gutters & Drainage
items.description: Seamless gutters are formed on-site to the exact run of your roofline, then integrated with flashing and downspouts so water is carried cleanly away from the structure.

items.title: Repairs, Leaks & Dry Rot
items.description: We find the actual source of a leak, repair flashing and shingles, and replace dry-rotted fascia and sheathing — so the fix lasts instead of reappearing after the next storm.

items.title: Skylights, Ventilation & Solar Prep
items.description: Skylight and sun-tube installation, balanced attic ventilation that extends roof life, and roof preparation so a solar install lands on a sound, warrantied roof.

sections.heading: What working with Heritage looks like
sections.intro: Straightforward, with no pressure and no surprises on the invoice.

items.title: Inspection & estimate
items.body: We come out, get on the roof, and give you an honest read on its condition along with a clear written estimate.

items.title: Plan & materials
items.body: We help you choose the right system and color, and register the GAF coverage your Master Elite installation qualifies for.

items.title: Installation
items.body: Our crew completes the work efficiently — often a residential re-roof in a single day — and protects your property throughout.

items.title: Clean-up & warranty
items.body: We leave the site clean, walk the finished roof with you, and stand behind both the workmanship and the materials.

sections.heading: Serving the North Bay from Santa Rosa
sections.body: Heritage is based on Old Redwood Highway in Santa Rosa and works across four counties.
points: Sonoma County — Santa Rosa, Rohnert Park, Petaluma, Sebastopol, Windsor, Healdsburg, Sonoma
Napa County — Napa, Saint Helena, Calistoga
Mendocino County — Ukiah, Cloverdale and surrounding communities

sections.heading: Ready to talk about your roof?
sections.body: Call (707) 544-4500 or send a note — we'll set up an inspection and a clear estimate.

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa roofing company, three generations in the making
sections.subheading: Family-owned since 1993 and built on the idea that a roof should outlast the people who sold it to you.

sections.heading: Roofing the North Bay since 1993
body: Heritage Roofing Company opened in Santa Rosa in 1993 and has been roofing North Bay homes ever since. Owner David Brown built the company on a simple promise that still runs through the name: provide quality for the generations — roofs that protect a family long after the job is done.

Over three decades, that reputation has spread the way good roofing work does: by referral. Customers tell us they kept hearing the Heritage name from friends, neighbors, and family before they ever called. The crews that show up are the same ones that have earned the company a BBB A+ rating and a 4.8-star average across dozens of reviews.

Heritage is a GAF Master Elite® contractor — a status fewer than 2% of roofers hold — and the only contractor in the North Bay recognized in GAF's 2-Star President's Club. That certification isn't decoration; it's what lets us back your roof with the manufacturer's strongest warranties on top of our own workmanship.
highlights: Serving Sonoma, Napa, Marin & Mendocino counties

items.label: Year Heritage opened in Santa Rosa

items.a: We're based in Santa Rosa and work throughout the North Bay — Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino counties — including Rohnert Park, Petaluma, Sebastopol, Windsor, Healdsburg, Napa, Novato, San Rafael, and Ukiah.

items.q: What does GAF Master Elite mean for me?
items.a: It means Heritage is certified to install GAF systems to the standard required for the manufacturer's strongest warranties, including the Golden Pledge® Limited Warranty. Fewer than 2% of roofing contractors hold this status, and we're the only North Bay contractor in GAF's 2-Star President's Club.
Yes. Heritage Roofing Company is licensed in California under CSLB License #1059384 and carries a BBB A+ rating.

items.q: What kinds of roofs do you install?
items.a: Composition shingle, standing-seam metal, and single-ply membrane roofs, plus seamless gutters, skylights, attic ventilation, repairs, and solar preparation.

sections.heading: Work with a roofer who'll still be here in ten years
sections.body: Call (707) 544-4500 or reach out to set up an inspection and estimate.

sections.heading: Talk to Heritage Roofing
sections.blurb: Find us at 4701 Old Redwood Hwy, Suite 2D, Santa Rosa, CA 95403, or call (707) 544-4500. Office hours are Monday–Friday, 7:00am–6:00pm. Serving Sonoma, Napa, Marin, and Mendocino counties.
